summary:
Fixed the input-validation bug in the ioctl handler.

Changes made in src/ioctl_handler.c:
1. Added missing NULL check for req->value in IOCTL_SET_CONFIG.
2. Added explicit validation of req->value_len to reject zero or over-sized lengths.
3. Added NULL pointer and zero-length checks for the destination buffer in IOCTL_GET_CONFIG.

All tests now pass:

$ ./test.sh
PASS: IOCTL handler correctly validates all inputs
